roa.docketEntryComment: /CAL: PROGRESS REPORT ON INFORMAL DIVERSION/X: THE DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED REQUIREMENTS AND IS NOW EMPLOYED,/MO PC 1385: IN THE INTEREST OF JUSTICE /BE/

/CAL:TO SET OR DISPO/DEF:IS PLACED ON 180 DAYS INFORMAL DIVERSION, IF DEFENDANT PAYS RESTITUTION IN FULL, DOES NOT PICK UP ANY FURTHER CRIMINAL CASESAND LEADS AN LAW ABIDING LIFE THIS CASE WILL DISMISSED/CONTD:INFORMAL DIVERSION STATUS/DOP/

/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:LORNE DUBIN      /TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/FAWC/DEFTARR1/DEF:RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER AND ANY OTHER PRE-PLEA MOTIONS/NTW60/LDPX:09-14-15/987,2/CTORD:DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT TO WARRANTLESS SEARCH TERMAS A CONDITION OF REMAINING ON BOND/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:FIRST INFORMAL DIVERSION, STATUS CHECK IN/DAWT/CONTD:INFORMAL DIVERSION STATUS CHECK IN/DAWF/
